wordpress.sessionExpired: Activation failed — session expired. Please try again.
wordpress.activationFailed: Something went wrong during activation. Please try again or contact support.
wordpress.tokenExpired: This activation link has expired. Please return to LoyaltyDog to generate a new one.
wordpress.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
wordpress.networkError: Unable to reach LoyaltyDog right now. Please try again shortly.
wordpress.invalidKey: Invalid activation key. Please contact support.
wordpress.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
